news.summary: Most Australians do not want the women and children to come home, but advocates say they're in danger.

news.headline: Al Jazeera reporter witnesses Israeli strikes on Lebanon
news.summary: Israel has increased its attacks across southern Lebanon. Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto reports from Tyre.
